summary: Made three surgical seam edits: reduced overlap with Chapter 7 at the opening, clarified that Noor redraws Marcus's sketch onto her terminal for the Chapter 9 handoff, and tightened the closing emphasis onto route-versus-access rather than repeating the prior chapter's air-and-bodies end beat.
edits: Reframed the opening to pick up directly from Marcus already being in the pod instead of reopening on the corridor smell.
Added a brief terminal-redraw beat so Marcus's dock sketch is explicitly on Noor's screen before the next chapter.
Adjusted the final paragraph so the chapter exits on Lena's ownership of the route rather than another generalized air/body-count image.
